title: Ba`alic #1185
definition:
Baalis = "lord of the banner: in causing the joy"

 1) king of the Ammonites at the time of the destruction of Jerusalem
    by Nebuchadnezzar
nasbUsage:
Definition: Baalis = "lord of the banner: in causing the joy"

 1) king of the Ammonites at the time of the destruction of Jerusalem
    by Nebuchadnezzar

    NASB:  perh. son of delight, an Ammonite king
